FAQ_002: Based on the product code, the JIRIG price comparator analyses the prices of the same IKEA product in most IKEA stores across Europe and instantly shows you the most advantageous price.
FAQ_003: Are the displayed prices always up to date?
FAQ_004: We update our database regularly to ensure the best information. Some products may be unavailable. Price changes can occur without our knowledge.
FAQ_006: No, promotional actions, advertisements and discounts offered by an IKEA store are not included. JIRIG is based on the prices listed on the official IKEA website.
FAQ_008: No, the comparator only works with identical references to guarantee the reliability of the result.
FAQ_009: Do the displayed prices include VAT?
FAQ_010: Yes, all displayed prices include VAT. Prices may vary depending on the country and applicable VAT rate.
FAQ_012: Yes, by creating a Wishlist or a Quote Project, you can save your comparisons to view later. In case of price changes (depending on the chosen plan), you will be notified.
FAQ_013: What should I do if a displayed price is incorrect?
FAQ_014: Use the contact form -> subject -> 'Price issue' to inform us, and we will get back to you to help.
FAQ_016: No, we do not sell products. JIRIG is only an IKEA price and quote comparator.
FAQ_018: No, the comparator does not indicate if the product is in stock, but you can check on the IKEA page.
FAQ_019: Can I use the comparator on my smartphone?
FAQ_020: Yes, our site is fully compatible with mobile phones and tablets.
FAQ_CONTACT_MESSAGE: Our team is here to help you

HTML_TERMS_ABONNEMENT:
Subscription

Users may subscribe to a plan whose price varies by duration and type of service.

Subscription types are detailed at: https://jirig.com/#abonnement-section

Acceptance of TOU and account creation constitutes acceptance of the Subscription.

Subscriptions are paid and grant access to JIRIG Services at the price listed on the website.

JIRIG sends a confirmation email with payment instructions for immediate execution of the Service.

Comparison results are confidential and reserved exclusively for the User.
HTML_TERMS_ACCEPTATIONS:
Acceptance of Terms

Accessing, browsing, and using the Platform is conditional on unconditional acceptance of these Terms.

These Terms apply to all Users, even when accessing the Platform outside the Kingdom of Belgium.

The Terms form a binding contract between the User and JIRIG.

Changes to the Terms during the contract period will be notified to registered Users via email and are considered accepted if:

  • the User does not object within four (4) weeks of receipt, and
  • JIRIG has highlighted the legal consequences in the communication.

Objections must be written, at minimum via email. In case of objection, the previous terms remain in effect.

No further modifications by the User will be accepted.
HTML_TERMS_BLOCK1:
TERMS OF USE

JIRIG APPLICATION

These Terms of Use define the conditions for using JIRIG services, operated by CDTEC Srl (BCE number BE0883.019.506) (hereinafter referred to as the “Company” or “JIRIG”).
HTML_TERMS_BLOCK2:
These “Terms of Use” or “TOU” apply to the use of the websites jirig.be, jirig.com (subject to updates) and any platform or mobile application providing access to current or future services, including mobile sites, mobile apps, partner sites, or affiliated platforms (hereinafter “Platform”) and other services provided by the Company.

JIRIG is a platform offering a price comparison service for one or more economic operators, taking into account the location of their sales points.
HTML_TERMS_BODY-POLICY:
JIRIG is a platform accessible via the websites jirig.be and jirig.com , as well as through any other platform or mobile application providing access to current or future services (mobile sites, apps, affiliated sites, affiliated platforms), hereinafter collectively referred to as “the Site.”

This privacy policy applies exclusively to our online activities and is valid for all users whose personal data we process. Its purpose is to inform users about how their personal data is processed by JIRIG in its capacity as data controller.

1. Information We Collect

JIRIG collects and processes personal data concerning:

  • Users of the Site;
  • Registered users of the Site (for example, when creating a user account).

When creating an account, we may request your contact details: first name, last name, address, email, phone number.

Categories of data processed:

  • Personal and contact information : first name, last name, address, phone number, email, date of birth; payment information, card numbers (in accordance with applicable laws), billing addresses, order history, email content related to Site usage, wishlist products, complaints, customer service interactions.
  • Marketing data : communication preferences, newsletter subscriptions, etc.
  • Site usage data : IP address, technical identifiers (network username, device MAC address, cookies), visit date and time, pages viewed, preferences. With your consent, these data may be used for advertising purposes.
  • Transaction data : full name, username, address, VAT number (if applicable), bank account, billing data, payment information.
  • Location data : if the user consents, for the IKEA store map and nearby services.
  • Mobile device identifiers : IDFA/GAID, push notification IDs, OS version and device type.
  • Data from third-party services integrated in the app : analytics, crash reports (Firebase, Google Analytics, Apple Analytics, etc.).

2. Purposes of Data Processing

We use collected data to:

  • Provide, operate, and maintain the Site;
  • Enable service use and display available prices depending on seller and location;
  • Improve, personalize, and develop the Site;
  • Analyze how you use the Site and develop new features;
  • Ensure account security (password management, detection of suspicious activities);
  • Communicate with you for support, marketing, promotion, and dispute resolution;
  • Allow business partners to display tailored advertising with your consent;
  • Detect and prevent fraud;
  • Process subscription payments (requiring contact and account details).
  • Send push notifications via Apple or Google for promotions or app updates.
  • Process data necessary for in-app purchases and premium subscriptions.

3. Legal Bases

These processes rely, depending on context, on:

  • Contract performance : site terms of use and service delivery requested by the user;
  • Legal obligations : accounting, tax, and regulatory duties;
  • Consent : where processing concerns targeted ads or marketing cookies (withdrawable at any time);
  • Legitimate interests : advertising activities, customer support efficiency, market research, and service improvement.

4. Recipients of Your Data

JIRIG shares personal data with service providers only where necessary and contractually regulated. These may include hosting, maintenance, payment processing, advertising partners, legal and accounting services.

Data collected for advertising purposes may be transferred to partners acting either as independent controllers or as processors under JIRIG’s instructions. The current partner list is available here: https://jirig.com/partners .

JIRIG may also be legally required to share data with authorities for investigations, prosecution, or public safety.

Apple and Google may receive certain data related to push notifications, in-app purchases, and analytics as part of the app.

5. Advertising Banners

Advertising banners may appear on the Site to fund our services. Some are personalized based on your interests, only with your consent via a banner on your first visit. You may accept or reject advertising cookies and change your preferences anytime using our cookie management tool (link at the bottom of the page).

Choosing the free subscription requires sharing certain data for advertising purposes. A paid ad-free option is also available.

JIRIG prohibits banners for sensitive products (unauthorized medicine, weapons, narcotics, alcohol in restricted contexts, etc.).

6. Third-Party Sites

The Site may contain links to third-party sites. JIRIG is not responsible for their content or data practices. We recommend reviewing their privacy policies.

7. Data Retention

JIRIG keeps your data only as long as necessary for the purposes pursued and legal compliance. Identification data is kept from registration until five (5) years after account closure to enable account recovery and meet legal requirements.

Advertising data and tracking cookies are retained for a maximum of thirteen (13) months.

Push notification and analytics data are retained according to third-party service rules (Firebase, Apple, Google), typically up to 13 months or until account deletion.

8. Your Rights

You have the following rights regarding your personal data: access, rectification, objection, restriction, erasure (where permitted by law), and withdrawal of consent. To exercise your rights, contact:

{email1}

To file a complaint, contact the Data Protection Authority: {email2} .

iOS users can also manage data deletion via their Apple account .

Android users can manage their data via their Google account or disable push notifications in device settings.

9. Amendments

We reserve the right to amend this Privacy Policy to comply with laws or adapt our practices. Please review it regularly. Updated versions will be published on the Site with a revision date.

Cookie Policy

When visiting our site, certain technical data (IP addresses, cookies) are processed to ensure security and functionality. This processing is based on legitimate interest.

What is a Cookie?

A cookie is a text file stored on your device that saves information (e.g., language choice). Cookies can be session-based (deleted upon closing) or persistent (expire later).

Why Do We Use Cookies?

JIRIG mainly uses:

  • Strictly necessary technical cookies;
  • Functional cookies;
  • Analytical (persistent) cookies.

Strictly Necessary Technical Cookies

These cookies are essential for site access and are placed immediately upon visiting.

Name Expiration Content Purpose
iprofile End of session Character string Links authenticated user requests to the session.
ibasket End of session Random string Assigns a server to handle requests from the same user.

Functional Cookies

These cookies are set after your choice and are necessary for some features. Example: bCookies — duration: 30 days — informs the site about your cookie consent.

Persistent Cookies

Persistent cookies remain after the session and personalize your experience (language, forms, social sharing, advertising). These require prior consent.

Third-Party Tracking Cookies

Third-party cookies are placed by external domains (advertising, social media). They measure visits, navigation, and display ads. JIRIG is not responsible for third-party privacy policies — please review them directly.

Mobile cookies and data (analytics, crash reports, push notifications) require consent and can be managed via the app or device settings.

How to View and Delete Cookies

You can modify your consent in the cookie management window (link at the page bottom) or through browser settings. Resources:

  • Firefox — delete cookies
  • Chrome — cookie settings
  • Safari — manage cookies
HTML_TERMS_CREATIONS:
Account Creation

Creating a personal account is free and provides features such as managing a personal Product selection Project.

Some services may be paid, such as price change alerts, price history, number of searches, etc.

Users must provide accurate, up-to-date, and complete information and maintain it.

Account creation entails cooperation with JIRIG to ensure security and confidentiality.

Users must assist in verifying account information and correcting any inaccuracies.

JIRIG may temporarily or permanently suspend access if an account compromises Services or violates the law.

In the event of theft or fraudulent use, Users must notify JIRIG immediately.

JIRIG is not responsible for unauthorized access by third parties except in cases of gross negligence.

Platform functionalities may evolve; some may be removed or added without creating acquired rights.

Project Creation by the User

The User can create a Project from their personal account.

This allows selecting Products to purchase and specifying the available Price based on the Vendor's sales points location.

After entering Products, JIRIG provides a comparison table of selected Product Prices.

The User can modify the proposal (remove, add a country, change quantities, etc.) and create variants of their Project.

Depending on the Subscription type (article 6), JIRIG sends an email notification about Project updates in case of price changes.

JIRIG does not guarantee timely notification of price changes. Notifications are informative only and do not constitute a contract. This applies to both JIRIG and the Vendor.

Users are responsible for checking current prices before placing an order with a Vendor.
HTML_TERMS_DEFINITIONS:
Definitions:

“Account”: strictly personal interface allowing users to log in, access services, and receive notifications from JIRIG.

“Subscription”: type of contract with JIRIG to access the services described under the “Subscription” tab. Subscriptions may be free or paid depending on the services chosen.

“Terms” or “TOU”: this agreement.

“Product”: tangible movable item offered for sale by a Vendor (e.g., IKEA) whose price is compared on the Platform.

“Services”: services provided by the Company on the Platform, as described in Article 2.

“Platform”: the websites https://www.jirig.be and https://jirig.com

“User”: any individual visiting and using the Platform.

“Vendor”: vendor offering its product on a website whose price is compared on the JIRIG Platform.
HTML_TERMS_DONNEES:
Personal Data

JIRIG processes Users' personal data according to the Privacy Policy accessible via the following link: jirig.com/terms.
HTML_TERMS_HEADER-POLICY:
Privacy Policy

Version published on the JIRIG site — jirig.be / jirig.com
HTML_TERMS_OBLIGATIONS:
User Obligations

Commitments Upon Accepting the TOU

By accepting these Terms, the User expressly guarantees to JIRIG that they:

  • are of legal age and capable of entering into contracts;
  • agree to comply with these TOU and applicable laws;
  • will use the Services only for their intended purpose, namely to be informed about price differences applied by a Vendor for the same Product depending on location;
  • will not post or transmit information or content linking to illegal, immoral, or irrelevant external sites;
  • will keep their login credentials confidential and use them only for authentication;
  • acknowledge responsibility for all information, photos, or data shared on the Platform;
  • will not access, display, download, or transmit any content from the Platform that violates laws or regulations;
  • will not perform any action that may compromise the proper functioning of the Platform.
HTML_TERMS_PRIX_PROPRIETE:
Intellectual Property

All elements of the Platform (texts, algorithms, graphics, website architecture, photographs, etc.) belong to JIRIG or are used by JIRIG with authorization from their respective owners.

These Terms of Use do not transfer any intellectual property rights or licenses to the User, neither on the structure nor on the content of the Site or the documentation provided to Users.

The User agrees not to use the Platform and Services in an unfair or parasitic manner, or in any way that infringes the rights of JIRIG.

Company names, logos, and/or product names mentioned on the Platform are trademarks or protected content owned by their respective owners.

Any copying of logos, trademarks, textual, pictorial, or video content from the Platform is prohibited and constitutes infringement, without prejudice to applicable exceptions.

Violation of these provisions gives JIRIG the right to terminate the contract, delete the User account, and pursue legal action against the infringing User.
HTML_TERMS_PROJECTS_CREATIONS:
Project Creation by Users

Users can create a Project via their personal account.

This allows selection of Products and specification of the available price depending on Vendor locations.

JIRIG provides a comparison table of selected Products.

Users can modify the proposal (add/remove countries, change quantities) and create Project variants.

Notifications of price changes will be sent according to the Subscription type.

JIRIG does not guarantee timely notifications; they are for informational purposes only.

Users remain responsible for checking current prices before placing an order with a Vendor.
HTML_TERMS_RECLAMATIONS-RIGHT:
Right of Withdrawal for Consumers

Subscriptions are service contracts. The right of withdrawal applies under Articles I.2,2° and Book VI of the Economic Law Code.

The right of withdrawal does not apply if the Service has been fully executed with the User’s prior express consent.

After payment confirmation, Services are considered fully executed.

If Services are not immediately used within 14 days, Users may exercise their withdrawal right by submitting the form to{email}.

Price and Payment

Subscription prices include all applicable taxes.

Payment is made via electronic methods available on the site.

By accepting the TOU, Users authorize JIRIG to receive payment on their behalf.

Duration

Subscription duration depends on the option selected by the User (monthly or annual).

Subscriptions automatically renew unless canceled at least 10 days before the expiry date by emailing{email}.

In cases of serious breach, JIRIG may delete the account without refund.
HTML_TERMS_RESPONSABILITE:
Liability

The User acknowledges that the characteristics and constraints of the Internet do not allow for absolute security online.

Consequently, JIRIG is not liable for damages resulting from Internet use, such as data loss, intrusions, viruses, access interruptions, or use of unsuitable equipment.

Access to the Platform may be temporarily interrupted for maintenance, updates, technical improvements, or content/presentation changes.

Whenever possible, JIRIG will inform Users in advance of maintenance or updates.

JIRIG disclaims all liability for bodily, moral, or economic damage resulting from the use of the Site.

The User accepts that Platform features may evolve, with some removed or added, without granting the User any acquired rights.

JIRIG strives to present information accurately, but errors may occur due to the volume of data or incorrect information from Seller websites. JIRIG does not control content, products, services, or information on Seller websites. Presence of hyperlinks does not engage JIRIG’s liability, including compliance with applicable laws.

JIRIG cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, timeliness, or quality of the information provided on the Platform.

In general, if JIRIG is held liable, liability is limited to the amount of Service fees.

Product sale contracts are concluded exclusively and directly between the Seller and the User, without JIRIG controlling the transaction.

Consequently, Seller terms may apply. JIRIG, as a comparison Platform, does not offer products for purchase nor intervenes in consumer credit contracts. No purchase, service, or credit contract is concluded with JIRIG.
HTML_TERMS_SERVICES:
Services Offered by JIRIG

JIRIG provides a price comparison service for Products offered by the same Vendor depending on the location of their sales points.

Users can create a Project to select Products they wish to purchase and receive a document comparing prices of the same Products based on location, or similar products from other Vendors at lower prices.

JIRIG only offers comparison services and does not sell, buy, or rent goods.

The comparison service is largely automated and objective, based on prices directly displayed by the Vendor and the Product codes.

JIRIG regularly updates displayed Products; last update dates are shown.

Upon request, the system updates prices and notifies Users according to Subscription type:

  • minor changes: email alert;
  • significant changes: new comparison table sent.

Promotions (local, temporary, spontaneous) are not considered; only prices published by the Vendor are used.

Information on the Platform may differ from Vendor websites regarding price, availability, or shipping.

PRIVACY_BANNER_TEXT: This privacy policy explains how JIRIG collects, uses and protects your personal data in accordance with the GDPR.
PRIVACY_SECTION_01_CONTENT:
JIRIG collects and processes personal data concerning Site users and registered users.

When you create an account, we may ask for: first name, last name, address, email and phone number.

Categories of data processed:
• Personal identification data: name, address, phone number, email, date of birth, payment information.
• Marketing data: communication preferences and newsletter subscriptions.
• Website usage data: IP address, technical identifiers, cookies, date and time of visits.
• Transaction data: full name, bank account number, billing information.
• Geolocation data: if the user allows it, for the IKEA store map.
• Mobile device identifiers: IDFA/GAID, push notification identifiers, OS version.
• Data collected by third-party services: analytics and crash reports (Firebase, Google Analytics, Apple Analytics).
PRIVACY_SECTION_02_CONTENT:
We use the collected information to:

• Provide, operate and maintain the Site.
• Enable the use of our services and display available prices.
• Improve, personalize and develop the Site.
• Analyze how you use the Site.
• Ensure the security of your account.
• Communicate with you for customer support, marketing and promotions.
• Allow business partners to display relevant advertising with your consent.
• Detect and prevent fraud.
• Process subscription payments.
• Send push notifications via Apple or Google.
• Process data required for in-app purchases and premium mobile subscriptions.
PRIVACY_SECTION_03_CONTENT:
Processing is based, depending on the case, on:

• Performance of a contract.
• Legal obligations.
• Consent.
• Legitimate interests.
PRIVACY_SECTION_04_CONTENT:
JIRIG shares personal data with service providers only when necessary and governed by contractual agreements.

The updated list of partners is available at: https://jirig.com/partners
PRIVACY_SECTION_05_NOTE: Claude products by Anthropic are ad-free — this policy only applies to third-party integrations.
PRIVACY_SECTION_06_CONTENT:
The Site may contain links to third-party websites. JIRIG is not responsible for the content or data collection practices of those websites.

We recommend that you review their privacy policies.
PRIVACY_SECTION_07_CONTENT:
JIRIG retains your data only for the period necessary to achieve the purposes described and in compliance with legal obligations.

• Identification data: from your registration until five (5) years after the end of your registration.
• Advertising data and tracking cookies: maximum thirteen (13) months.
• Push notification and analytics data: according to third-party service rules (Firebase, Apple, Google), generally limited to 13 months or until account deletion.
PRIVACY_SECTION_08_CONTENT:
You have the following rights regarding your personal data: access, rectification, objection, restriction, deletion (where permitted by law), and withdrawal of consent.

To exercise your rights, please contact our service via the contact form.

In case of complaint, you may contact the Data Protection Authority.

• iOS users can manage deletion of their data via their Apple account.
• Android users can manage their data via their Google account or disable push notifications in phone settings.
PRIVACY_SECTION_08_NOTE: You can exercise your rights at any time by contacting us via the Contact & Support page.
PRIVACY_SECTION_09_CONTENT:
We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy to comply with laws or adapt our practices.

Please review it regularly. New versions will be published on the Site with an updated date.
PRIVACY_SECTION_10_CONTENT:
A cookie is a text file stored on your device that allows information to be retained (for example language preferences).

JIRIG mainly uses:
• Strictly necessary technical cookies (placed upon access to the Site).
• Functional cookies (after your choice — e.g. bCookies, duration 30 days).
• Persistent analytics cookies.

You can change your consent in the cookie management window or through your browser settings.

Cookies and mobile data (analytics, crash reports, push notifications) require consent and can be managed via the application or phone settings.
